title: ericameria laricifolia
intro: Ericameria laricifolia, also known as the Bunchberry Chrysopsis or Bunchberry Goldenbush, is a shrub-like plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family and is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties due to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones. The health benefits of Ericameria laricifolia include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to take advantage of its medicinal and health benefits.
